outcomes: Classify synovial joint configurations and model their structural mechanical leverage during athletic movements
Analyze the recruitment profiles of slow-twitch (Type I) and fast-twitch (Type II) muscle fibers across diverse exercise domains
Contrast the physiological thresholds of the ATP-CP, Anaerobic Lactic, and Aerobic metabolic energy production systems

sub_strands.sub_strand: Linear/Angular Motion Kinetics and Projectile Parameters
outcomes: Calculate angular velocity, torque, and center of mass displacements during complex jumping or throwing tasks
Evaluate variables (release velocity, angle, height) altering the parabolic trajectory path of athletic projectiles

learning_areas.learning_area: Sports Nutrition, Coaching, and Injury Management

strands.strand: Athletic Dietetics, Training Principles, and First Aid Care

sub_strands.sub_strand: Macronutrient Loading, Training Laws, and Acute Injury Triage
outcomes: Design optimized carbohydrate loading programs and hydration schedules customized to specific athletic event profiles
Apply core training principles (overload, specificity, reversibility) to design longitudinal macrocycle performance charts
Demonstrate standard on-field first aid procedures (PRICE protocol) to stabilize acute soft-tissue sports injuries safely
